testcase.name: createSchedule_shouldPersist
testcase.system-out:

for 3.477) Hibernate: insert into sys_user (created_at, last_login_time, lock_time, login_fail_count, password, phone, remember_password, status, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into sch_schedule (category, created_at, note, remind_before, repeat_end_date, repeat_month_date, repeat_type, repeat_week_days, schedule_date, schedule_time, status, title, updated_at, user_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.category, s1_0.created_at, s1_0.note, s1_0.remind_before, s1_0.repeat_end_date, s1_0.repeat_month_date, s1_0.repeat_type, s1_0.repeat_week_days, s1_0.schedule_date, s1_0.schedule_time, s1_0.status, s1_0.title, s1_0.updated_at, s1_0.user_id from sch_schedule s1_0 where s1_0.user_id=? and s1_0.status=? order by s1_0.schedule_date
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/Users/ninebot/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.14.12/byte-buddy-agent-1.14.12.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: checkReminders_shouldReturnDue
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into sys_user (created_at, last_login_time, lock_time, login_fail_count, password, phone, remember_password, status, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into sch_schedule (category, created_at, note, remind_before, repeat_end_date, repeat_month_date, repeat_type, repeat_week_days, schedule_date, schedule_time, status, title, updated_at, user_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.category, s1_0.created_at, s1_0.note, s1_0.remind_before, s1_0.repeat_end_date, s1_0.repeat_month_date, s1_0.repeat_type, s1_0.repeat_week_days, s1_0.schedule_date, s1_0.schedule_time, s1_0.status, s1_0.title, s1_0.updated_at, s1_0.user_id from sch_schedule s1_0 where s1_0.user_id=? and s1_0.status=1 and timestamp(s1_0.schedule_date, s1_0.schedule_time) between ? and ?

testcase.name: searchSchedules_shouldReturnMatches
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into sys_user (created_at, last_login_time, lock_time, login_fail_count, password, phone, remember_password, status, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into sch_schedule (category, created_at, note, remind_before, repeat_end_date, repeat_month_date, repeat_type, repeat_week_days, schedule_date, schedule_time, status, title, updated_at, user_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into sch_schedule (category, created_at, note, remind_before, repeat_end_date, repeat_month_date, repeat_type, repeat_week_days, schedule_date, schedule_time, status, title, updated_at, user_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.category, s1_0.created_at, s1_0.note, s1_0.remind_before, s1_0.repeat_end_date, s1_0.repeat_month_date, s1_0.repeat_type, s1_0.repeat_week_days, s1_0.schedule_date, s1_0.schedule_time, s1_0.status, s1_0.title, s1_0.updated_at, s1_0.user_id from sch_schedule s1_0 where s1_0.user_id=? and s1_0.title like ? escape '\\' and s1_0.status=?
